experiment_card.research_question: Can a chunked/source-grounded LLM method preserve exact source grounding better than the long-context method, and what broader trading-judgment abstraction does it lose?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On the same source excerpt and benchmark as long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001, a chunked/source-grounded method may improve span traceability while weakening broad judgment abstraction and cross-segment synthesis.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately executed live run, create proposal-only export records and compare source grounding, abstraction loss, unsupported-claim handling, and negative-result value against long_context_judgment_live_pilot_001. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
